Apple, Nvidia Supplier TSMC Rises In Premarket Following Stellar 45% Revenue Boost In July Amid Strong AI Chip Demand
data.description: TSMC's impressive performance comes on the heels of its market capitalization reaching the $1 trillion mark in July.

data.title: Amazon's Chinese Rival Temu's Billionaire Founder Colin Huang Replaces Bottled-Water King Zhong Shanshan To Become China's Richest Person
data.description: Colin Huang, founder of PDD Holdings, has surpassed bottled-water magnate Zhong Shanshan to become China's richest person with a net worth of $48.6 billion, driven by the global expansion of Pinduoduo under the name Temu.

data.title: Tesla Offers 3 Years Of FSD, Premium Connectivity, And Free Supercharging For $5,000, But Is It Worth It?
data.description: EV giant Tesla is offering new Model S and X customers an option to purchase its full self-driving (FSD) driver assistance technology on their new rides for a reduced price of $5000 for three years.
